title: Harness Skill v2
summary: 智能体团队系统，实现从 PRD 到部署的全流程自动化。
explanation: 这是 Pigou 在 agentic engineering 方向的工程方法实验，试图把需求、实现、测试、部署串成可复用的智能体协作流程。
goals: 建立 PRD 到部署的流水线
沉淀多智能体工程协作规范
nextActions: Generate LLM code insights for the most important source files.
Clarify runtime stack and entrypoint because package metadata is missing.
Add one approved public screenshot or product surface image.
补 README 的最小可运行路径：install、run、check 三组命令，并明确入口是 CLI、bin 脚本还是 Python 库。

progressEvaluation.summary: GitHub sync processed; Pigou OS refreshed the project wiki, progress, status, and sync log signals from repository evidence.
progressEvaluation.rationale: The sync pipeline applied local repository, wiki, task, image, and log signals after refreshing GitHub data.

dimensions.name: product_readiness
dimensions.reason: Project status, launch wording, and product surface signals.

dimensions.name: technical_completeness
dimensions.reason: Repository file count, framework, entrypoint, module, and code insight signals.

dimensions.name: usage_validation
dimensions.reason: Launch/use wording, screenshots, and visible product proof.

dimensions.name: documentation_knowledge
dimensions.reason: Project notes, README summary, and wiki/code insight completeness.

dimensions.name: momentum
dimensions.reason: Recent push, linked work items, and project log activity.
